response.reasoning: Role requires ~15 years experience and Principal/Director-level IC focused on AI strategy, cloud platforms, and engineering leadership. Candidate has roughly 14-16 years of experience starting from freelance work in 2006/2009, mostly at Senior/Staff levels, not Principal or Director. Strong full-stack and polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) with some recent AI-agent infrastructure exposure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq since April 2025 — only ~14 months of explicit AI work. No demonstrated AI products at scale, no advanced degree (BS only), no clear cloud-platform strategy work or executive-level customer advisory experience. Entrepreneurial signal exists via GISCollective founding. Lacks the recognized AI expertise, ML depth, and Director-level IC influence the role demands.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack and systems engineering experience
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive and long-term product ownership
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No Principal/Director-level title or evidence of org-wide technical leadership
Minimal demonstrated AI/ML depth — no shipped AI products, no advanced AI degree
Limited cloud-platform strategy experience and no record of advising strategic customers
response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with strong craft, polyglot range, and an entrepreneurial side project, but the role calls for a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud-platform strategy chops, and external advisory presence. AI exposure is recent and narrow (about a year on MCP/agent tooling), and there is no evidence of shipped AI products, platform-level strategy work, or influencing engineering organizations at scale. A screening conversation could clarify the AI scope at re:cinq, but the gap to Principal/AI-strategy is substantial.
